# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

apiVersion: "deploymentmanager.googleapis.com/v2"
kind: "Deployment"
spec:
  resources:
  - type: "compute.v1.instance"
    name: "app-server"
    properties:
      zone: "us-central1-a"
      machineType: "n1-standard-1"
      disks:
        - deviceName: "boot"
          type: "PERSISTENT"
          autoDelete: true
          boot: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: "projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-9"
            diskSizeGb: 10
        - deviceName: "data"
          type: "SCRATCH"
          autoDelete: true
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: "global/networks/default"
          accessConfigs:
            - name: "External NAT"
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      metadata:
        startup-script: |
          # Install Python and Flask on the instance
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install python3-pip
          pip3 install flask
  
  - type: "compute.v1.firewall"
    name: "app-server-firewall"
    properties:
      network: "global/networks/default"
      allows:
        - protocol: tcp
          ports:
            - "8080"
      targetTags:
        - "app-server"
  
  - type: "compute.v1.address"
    name: "app-server-ip"
    properties:
      region: "us-central1"
      addressType: INTERNAL
      purpose: GCE_ENDPOINT
      networkTier: PREMIUM
  
  - type: "compute.v1.instanceGroup"
    name: "app-server-ig"
    properties:
      zone: "us-central1-a"
      namedPorts:
        - name: http
          port: 8080
      instanceTemplate: "projects/${PROJECT_ID}/global/instanceTemplates/app-server"
      targetSize: 3
  
  - type: "compute.v1.httpHealthCheck"
    name: "app-server-hc"
    properties:
      port: 8080
      requestPath: "/"
  
  - type: "compute.v1.backendService"
    name: "app-server-bs"
    properties:
      healthChecks: ["projects/${PROJECT_ID}/global/httpHealthChecks/app-server-hc"]
      sessionAffinity: NONE
      backend:
        - group: "projects/${PROJECT_ID}/zones/us-central1-a/instanceGroups/app-server-ig"
  
  - type: "compute.v1.urlMap"
    name: "app-server-um"
    properties:
      defaultService: "projects/${PROJECT_ID}/global/backendServices/app-server-bs"
      hostRules:
        - hosts: ["*"]
          pathMatcher: "app-server-pm"
      pathMatchers:
        - name: "app-server-pm"
          defaultService: "projects/${PROJECT_ID}/global/backendServices/app-server-bs"
  
  - type: "compute.v1.targetHttpProxy"
    name: "app-server-tph"
    properties:
      urlMap: "projects/${PROJECT_ID}/regions/us-central1/urlMaps/app-server-um"
  
  - type: "compute.v1.targetHttpsProxy"
    name: "app-server-thp"
    properties:
      urlMap: "projects/${PROJECT_ID}/regions/us-central1/urlMaps/app-server-um"
  
  - type: "compute.v1.sslCertificate"
    name: "app-server-cert"
    properties:
      privateKey: "$(ref.ssl-key.privateKey)"
      certificate: "$(ref.ssl-cert.certificate)"
      subjectAlternativeNames: ["${APP_SERVER_URL}"]
  
  - type: "compute.v1.globalForwardingRule"
    name: "app-server-gfr"
    properties:
      target: "$(ref.tph.selfLink)"
      IPAddress: "$(ref.ssl-cert.ipAddress)"
      portRange: 443
  
  - type: "compute.v1.instanceGroupManager"
    name: "app-server-igm"
    properties:
      baseInstanceName: "app-server"
      instanceTemplate: "$(ref.app-server-it.selfLink)"
      targetSize: 3
      zone: "us-central1-a"
